name: Zero-shot triple extraction from engineering standards

paper.title: LLM-based Zero-shot Triple Extraction for Automated Ontology Generation from Software Engineering Standards

difficulty.rationale: Five-stage zero-shot pipeline over standard documents; no fine-tuning/GPU/labelled data, fully deterministic mock possible, but more stages (segmentation, mining, relation inference, normalization, cross-section alignment) than the single-step CQ method.
